scripts.deploy:staging: pnpm cf:check --env staging --remote-secrets && CLOUDFLARE_ENV=staging pnpm build && wrangler deploy --env staging
scripts.deploy:prod: pnpm cf:check --env production --remote-secrets && CLOUDFLARE_ENV=production pnpm build && wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.cf:provision:staging: wrangler d1 create projectspice-staging --env staging --binding DB --location wnam && wrangler kv namespace create SESSIONS --env staging --binding SESSIONS && wrangler r2 bucket create projectspice-images-staging --env staging --binding IMAGES --location wnam && wrangler queues create projectspice-pdf-import-staging
scripts.cf:provision:prod: wrangler d1 create projectspice-production --env production --binding DB --location wnam && wrangler kv namespace create SESSIONS --env production --binding SESSIONS && wrangler r2 bucket create projectspice-images-prod --env production --binding IMAGES --location wnam && wrangler queues create projectspice-pdf-import-prod
scripts.db:migrate:staging: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --env staging --remote
scripts.db:migrate:prod: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --env production --remote
